parameters.jsCode:
// Extract payload and format hospitality email const payload = $json; const disruption = payload.disruption_summary || {}; const altOps = payload.alternate_airport_ops || []; const stranded = payload.stranded_pax_at_hub || {}; const yyzReqs = payload.yyz_hub_requirements || {}; const costs = payload.cost_summary || {}; let emailBody = `

🏨 NexusRecover Hospitality Requirements Activated

Disruption: ${disruption.event || 'Unknown'}

Hub: ${disruption.hub_airport || 'YYZ'}

Diversion Summary

  • Diverted flights: ${disruption.total_diverted_flights || 0}
  • PAX diverted: ${disruption.total_pax_diverted || 0}
  • PAX stranded at hub: ${disruption.total_pax_stranded_at_hub || 0}
  • Business stranded: ${disruption.pax_breakdown_stranded?.business || 0}
  • Economy stranded: ${disruption.pax_breakdown_stranded?.economy || 0}

⚠️ ALTERNATE AIRPORT OPERATIONS (${altOps.length})

`; for (const alt of altOps) { if (alt.status !== 'ACTIVE') continue; emailBody += `

${alt.iata} — ${alt.name}

Incoming flights: ${alt.incoming_flights?.map(f => f.flight_id).join(', ') || 'None'}

Total PAX incoming: ${alt.total_pax_incoming} (Biz: ${alt.pax_breakdown?.business || 0}, Eco: ${alt.pax_breakdown?.economy || 0})

Ground Transport Requirements:

  • Vehicles required: ${alt.ground_transport?.vehicles_required || 0}
  • Transfer time to YYZ: ${alt.ground_transport?.estimated_transfer_min || 0} min
  • Cost per PAX: $${alt.ground_transport?.cost_per_pax_usd || 0}
  • Total transport cost: $${alt.ground_transport?.total_transport_cost_usd?.toLocaleString() || 0}
  • Priority: ${alt.ground_transport?.priority_boarding || 'Standard'}

On-Site Requirements:

    ${alt.on_site_requirements?.map(r => `
  • ${r}
    • `).join('') || ''}
`; } emailBody += `

🛏️ STRANDED PAX AT YYZ — HOTEL & MEAL REQUIREMENTS

Total stranded: ${stranded.total_pax || 0} PAX

Hotel rooms required: ${stranded.hotel_rooms_required || 0} (${stranded.hotel_type_required || '3-4 star'})

Meal vouchers: ${stranded.meal_vouchers?.count || 0} × $${stranded.meal_vouchers?.value_per_pax_usd || 0}/pax

Groups:

    ${stranded.groups?.map(g => `
  • ${g.group_id}: ${g.count} ${g.tier} PAX from ${g.origin} → ${g.missed_destination}
    • `).join('') || ''}

🎫 YYZ HUB HOSPITALITY REQUIREMENTS

Lounge activation: ${yyzReqs.lounge_activation ? 'YES — ' + yyzReqs.lounge_pax_count + ' Business PAX' : 'NO'}

Customer service desks needed: ${yyzReqs.customer_service_desks_needed || 2}

Rebooking priority:

    ${yyzReqs.rebooking_priority?.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join('') || ''}

Announcement script:

${yyzReqs.announcement_script || ''}

💰 Cost Summary

  • Ground transport total: $${costs.ground_transport_total_usd?.toLocaleString() || 0}
  • Stranded PAX total cost: $${costs.stranded_pax_total_cost_usd?.toLocaleString() || 0}

Issued at: ${payload.issued_at_utc} | System: ${payload.issued_by}

`; return { email_body: emailBody, payload: payload };

parameters.subject: [URGENT] NexusRecover Hospitality Plan - Stranded PAX & Alternate Airport Ops
